user.title: Connect to Portland TriMet Arrivals
user.description: Enter your TriMet developer API key and the shared polling interval for all monitors.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the TriMet API
error.invalid_auth: The TriMet API key is invalid

abort.already_configured: This TriMet API key is already configured

monitor_add.title: Add monitor
monitor_add.description: Create a stop monitor. Leave route, direction, or vehicle type blank to match all values.

data_description.allowed_routes: Comma-separated route IDs or line numbers, for example 6, 72, 90
data_description.allowed_directions: Comma-separated TriMet direction labels, for example northbound, westbound
data_description.allowed_vehicle_types: Comma-separated values from bus, max, streetcar, wes

monitor_edit.title: Edit monitor
monitor_edit.description: Update the monitor fields. Blank filters still match all values.

data_description.allowed_routes: Comma-separated route IDs or line numbers, for example 6, 72, 90
data_description.allowed_directions: Comma-separated TriMet direction labels, for example northbound, westbound
data_description.allowed_vehicle_types: Comma-separated values from bus, max, streetcar, wes

error.invalid_vehicle_type: Vehicle types must be bus, max, streetcar, and/or wes

abort.no_monitors: There are no monitors to manage
